game.title: Umblight (Jam Version)
game.short_text: An RPG rogue-like, where you combine cards to defeat your enemy.

details.title: Umblight (Jam Version)
details.description:
PLEASE USE FULL SCREEN
Game was only tested on Chrome. If you're having lag or any issues, please try using Chrome.
Wishlist on Steam!


Combine your cards into stronger ones

Travel between rooms, and collect loot

Controls: 
Mouse, scroll wheel for looking up and down in fights.

Game design document
The OST can be found here
Update 1.1b:
Dying now properly resets activated skills and special card deck.
Tutorial does not repeat anymore after dying.
A softlock related to scene loading was fixed. This bug used to cause cards not being able to be dragged around.
Shadow cards now show a "?" for power value instead of just hiding it.
The narrator only announces new items you haven't seen when opening treasure. This is saved into your savefile and should speed up gameplay by a lot.
Door interactions have been changed slightly.
Fights don't start immediately after the narrator stops talking. You need to click on the table now to start the fight. This gives the player time to change their deck if necessary.
Card slots can no longer get stuck after removing a card too quickly. (at least in theory?)
Hitbox of fight triggers were modified so that they can't be pressed at the same time as the deck button.
Added an "erase save data" button to the bottom left corner of settings. This also resets tutorial progress.
Certain rooms have shorter dialogue after you entered them more than twice. This is saved in your save data.

resultData.title: Refresh: A Tale of Two Tabs

game.title: Refresh: A Tale of Two Tabs
game.short_text: Break the laws of time and space to brew a refreshing potion

details.title: Refresh: A Tale of Two Tabs
details.description:
Wishlist my new game on Steam!

Disclaimer: This clues in this game are very cryptic so I added a helpful hint section at the end of the description. The hints are in a relatively chronological order. Good Luck!
Game Design Document (puzzle spoilers): https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vSkQShIfZdUmYfO_xDETLXGTGpuKZ4QU_AGl...
Brew up a nice refreshment as Keek the frog. You may have to break a few time-space continuum laws to do it but it'll be worth it!
DON'T PLAY ON EDGE BROWSER, the jump height is lower for some reason. Chrome or Firefox recommended. Jump height is also messed up by performance so refresh if it gets laggy. There has been one case where the meta mechanics were not working, to avoid this you should either close all other tabs unrelated to the game, especially other itch.io tabs or clear your cache/try a different browser.
Move - Arrows/WASD
Jump - Space/Up
Interact/Place - Down
Refresh Tab - Manual refresh is part of the game
Unsoftlock - U (only for if you get completely trapped even after refreshing the tab, you should not be regularly using this: resets position, destroys items, and resets cauldron,  not part of any puzzle solutions)
Song - Luciid by TeraVex https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/905077
This game has meta mechanics, allow pop ups, its part of the game. Keep an open mind, clues are important!
Made in 2 weeks for the Pirate Software (before the controversy) - Game Jam 15. The theme was Shadows and Alchemy. The main goal of the game is to gather ingredients to make a brew (alchemy), and the shadow theme is implemented but I cannot say how without spoilers.
Hints (spoilers):

  Click to reveal (Items)
How each item works: The white item is lead (Pb), it makes you heavy and unable to jump high but allows you to break some floors if you fall from a great enough height. The fire acts like a mobile light and can also burn wood. The crystal switches your gravity when you jump but only a certain amount of times before it breaks. The block allows you to place one square block in front of you that you can jump on.


  Click to reveal (The Button)
The big red button simply opens another tab of the game but only two tabs are required to beat it so don't let it clog up your browser by pressing it a million times.


  Click to reveal (Refreshing)
Some information can be saved across a refresh but only when specific conditions are met.


  Click to reveal (Coordinate Display)
This clue reveals what would be saved when the game is refreshed but mainly how to save your position across a refresh. Pay close attention to your positioning in relation to the light when you refresh.


  Click to reveal (Two Tabs)
Cross-Tab Communication: some information can be transmitted from one tab of the game to another. The phrase "Last Light" is important here.


  Click to reveal (Button Mural)
This mural reveals how to save an item you are holding across a refresh and how to bring it into a position with light using another tab. Pay close attention to your positioning in relation to the light on both tabs.


  Click to reveal (Hidden Mural)
Mural behind wall: Using knowledge from previous hints this mural should be reachable. However, here is what it says: There is a special event that occurs during the first minute of each refresh which is revealed by the timer next to the mural. If a wooden or cracked wall is broken during this event, it will start broken in the next refresh.


  Click to reveal (Lift Mural)
The lift is special in that it can be activated from anywhere using previously learned mechanics. Think about why there are two images in the mural and the difference between them.


  Click to reveal (Putting it all Together)
Even after knowing all the meta mechanics the final solution can be quite difficult to discover, probably to its detriment, but here are a few hints on how to figure it out. Your goal is to bring all of the ingredients to the cauldron in one tab because the state of the cauldron cannot be saved across tabs or refreshes.


  Click to reveal (Which Wall?)
You only have enough time to break one wall during the glitch, so which one? You need to break the cracked floor to the far left that leads down into the lower level.


  Click to reveal (Order of Operation)
The items will be brought to the cauldron in the following order: Fire, Lead, Crystal.


  Click to reveal (Item Uses)
Fire: The fire will be used to burn the wall to the right of the cauldron before being deposited.
Lead: The lead will be used to break the wall into the lower level and the wall above the cauldron room.
Crystal: The crystal will be used to get the block.
Block: The block will be used to create a path to the cauldron for the lead.
Lift: The lift will be used to retrieve the crystal.


  Click to reveal (The Crystal's Path)
The crystal will not need to regain it's uses via a refresh.
Before you even grab the crystal, the floor leading to the lower level, the floor above the cauldron, and the wall to the right of the cauldron will be broken.
There exists a path that allows you to get up to where the block is stored with 2 crystal uses left, you will need to drop the crystal while on the ceiling but you will need to retrieve it from the ground.


  Click to reveal (The Final Solution)
The game can be beaten with just two tabs. Step one is to open two tabs in the default set-up with the player in the cauldron room and no items used or walls broken. In your “main” tab, grab the lead and climb up the stairs to break the cracked floor on the far left, wait for the glitch to occur and then break the floor, remain in the dark and then switch to your other tab. In this tab, break the same floor (glitch does not matter here) and bring the fire up to where you would be able to jump down and break the cracked floor in the gravity crystal room. Then switch to your other tab and refresh. You should now have the lead and be able to jump down and break the floor, landing in the hole in the cauldron room. Drop the lead and go get the fire, if done correctly the wall blocking the fire from getting out of the bottom level should already be broken. Bring the fire to the wooden wall in the room to the right of the cauldron and burn it, then deposit the fire in the cauldron. Next go get the gravity crystal and use it twice to get out and then hold left falling through the hole where the ground was. Keep holding left, this should bring you to the lower level and then go right to the room with the hole in the ceiling below the cauldron room. Go up there and hold right and travel up to the block item, drop the crystal on the ceiling inside the tunnel leading to the block item where there is a 1 block gap between the floor and the ceiling (so that it has 2 uses left and you can re-grab it from the floor later). Now grab the block and bring it down to where the lead is, this will allow you to bring the lead up to the cauldron. Finally, position yourself above where the rising platform would come through the floor. Activate the platform in the other tab and quickly switch back so that it brings you up to where you left the gravity crystal. Grab the crystal and use the last two clicks to escape through the left path and bring it to the cauldron.

game.short_text: A short adventure game about restoring light to a land of darkness

game.title: Die & Portent
game.short_text: Top down strategy roguelike

details.title: Die & Portent
details.description:
This is a turn based strategy roguelike in a similar vein to X-com, but at the start of each encounter the dice of fate will portent your coming encounter.  This determines your starting buffs.  Right-click to pan, Click to select and move units, pickup and apply items.
~4,000 lines of code!Game Design Doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1JYqFQluIJLpXCDi3gTteGELupQHUzSW3ReJzafGQ03I/...
Dev Diary: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1MzrGJZPna_XlfGspptHn1LvO8yikktZLj8C8f63al4Q/...

game.title: Sunless Stronghold
game.short_text: Stealth Platformer

details.title: Sunless Stronghold
details.description:
SUNLESS STRONGHOLD


A man shares his belief on the infamous "Which came first? The Chicken or The Egg?" discussion, and gets thrown out and turned into a shadow by an alchemist with anger issues.
Play 5 Short levels where you sneak around guards, platform, discover and drink magical potions that the clumsy alchemist man left around his castle.

Controls! :
A/D - Walk
Space - Jump
Shift - Shrink
CTRL - Phase
E - Cast Spell
TAB  - Pause



Shadow Form! :
Phase through the cracks in wood walls by pressing CTRL!  Be aware of your mana bar!
Don't alert the guards by walking directly behind or infront of them, just stand still! They won't notice you... unless you're standing inside a torch's light, maybe just don't do that... not even Phasing will help you in that situation.

Spells from potions! :
Blue Fire - Red fire is bright and scary, so use this cooler spell to burn wooden crates in your way, maybe above an enemy to drop something on him...
Shock - Why is electricity in a medieval game? who cares! knock out multiple enemies in a flash, maybe even power a lever with it!

See a glitch?  no you didn't!
UPDATE (29/07) : Added secret circles to find in Levels 2-5 + Added Balance + Added more to the tutorial.

A Game for Pirate Software's Game Jam #15

moreInfo.Tags: Medieval, No AI, Pixel Art, Stealth

game.title: Shadow Beast
game.short_text: Master the form of shadow to further your Alchemical knowledge

details.title: Shadow Beast
details.description:
Made for Pirate Software Game Jam #15
You control an aspiring alchemist, who can use a special potion to temporarily transform into a shadow beast.
When in shadow form, you can not interact with the physical world, but can pass through obstacles like gates and be unharmed by spikes. Be careful though, as you are vulnerable to light sources. 
Change form between shadow and corporeal to solve puzzles, find secrets and navigate the rooms of the Order of Alchemists to obtain the tomes of hidden knowledge to further your studies.

Keyboard
WASD  -> Move
Space -> Jump
Shift -> Use a potion to transform into a shadow beast.
Delete -> Restart level

Controller

Left Analog Stick  -> Move

Bottom Button (Xbox A, Sony Cross, Nintendo B) -> Jump
Right Bumper / Trigger (Xbox RT / RB, Sony R1 / R2, Nintendo Right Shoulder) -> Use a potion to transform into a shadow beast.

Top Button (Xbox Y, Sony Triangle, Nintendo X) -> Restart level

All levels are able to be 100% completed, including obtaining secrets in 1 run. Not all levels are easy though...

Game Design Document
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1QV6AA4ohYmAlo65IXNTYwmIkld5AMUwahtlBwiyrvu8/...

game.title: Alchemist's Dungeon
game.short_text: A small roguelike made for the Pirate Software Game Jam in 14 Days

details.title: Alchemist's Dungeon
details.description:
A small roguelike made for the Pirate Software Game Jam 15 in 14 Days
Important info if you play in the Browser:Please move your mouse to the center of your screen before you close the Brewing Menu or else you won't be able to look around
Story:You play as an Alchemist who is fighting through a Dungeon to find a Magical Scroll that grants the reader immense power
Controls:WASD: MoveSpace: JumpLeft Mouse Button: Throw PotionsTAB: Open/Close Brewing MenuScroll Wheel / Numbers 1-5: Select Slot
Elemental Types:Check the GDD to help with the strengths and weaknesses of each type!
Post-Jam Update 1:- Made the game a lot easier- Changed the way potions are thrown- Added permanent progression in form of upgrades applied at the bookshelf- Added a way to make the game harder through sacrifices- Changed the boss fight at the end- Added new music for the boss fight- Made the tutorial optional- Added an option to change the mouse sensitivity- Fixed UI scaling for resolutions higher than 1920x1080- Fixed tooltips for items- Many more minor bugfixes
GDD:https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Fnzwyfjlit4wwiH1ghsLRvE8TwD8_XBlcx-8QdvvknA/edit?usp=sharing

game.title: DevVoid (WIP v0.6.1)
game.short_text: puzzle platformer

details.title: DevVoid (WIP v0.6.1)
details.description:
Disclaimer: Work in progress. There is a complete experience, but it lacks minor tweaks and an overhaul of the current level design.
This game is being made while competing in the Pirate Software Game Jam of '24. It's also my first deep dive into game dev, please be nice :)
Story
You're an aspiring alchemist that made one mistake, and one mistake only. By trying some forbidden techniques you devoided the world of all it's color, and it's life. Every inhabitant of your town has ben tansmuted into a basic element. You however... remain intact. It's your mission to reverse what you've done, to right what you've wronged. Collect resources, follow your handy recipe guide and restore life!
Controls
Left: ARight: DSprint: ShiftJump: SpaceInteract: E (and 1-3)Inventory: TabUse Mouse for drag & dropCombine: C
Credits
Character/NPC spritesheet: PenzillaMusic & Sound effects: r3config
GDD: Game Design Document  (in case the download button looks too scetchy for a google doc)

details.title: Out Of Philosopher's Stones
details.description:
Flasky McFlask is in trouble. The shadows have reduced Alchemy Village to rubble and only he remains alive. Without Philosopher's Stones, Alchemists stand no chance against the shadows. However, Flasky McFlask is not somebody that gives up easily. He might have run out of Philosopher's Stones, but he is not out of options.
Game Objective
Survive in the arena by evading bullets and killing enemies.
Enemies drop ingredients when killed. Mixing ingredients is crucial - their effects will allow you to survive for longer.
As Alchemists used to say:
Roses are redViolets are blueMix some ingredientsor you are screwed
Can you reach a score of over 500?
Controls
WASD - Move aroundMouse - AimLeft Click/Space - FireShift - Walk. Reduces move speed while pressed, useful for evading bullets 1,2,3 - Mix ingredients in the inventory. Two ingredients will create a weapon effect. Try different combinations and learn to use them to your advantage. There is a total of  four different weapon effects.T - Toggle fullscreenM - Toggle music
Game Design Document
 https://docs.google.com/document/d/1TyoQE06wHbHzO-LcOq5t7q8QkPlqd8dycI5I6Aken-A/...

game.title: ALCOLORMY
game.short_text: Precision Puzzle Platformer with color theory!

details.title: ALCOLORMY
details.description:
CONTROLS:
Movement/Navigate menu - WASD
Jump/Accept - Spacebar
Dash - K
Launch Potion - J
Pause Game/Options - P
ABOUT:
Blop has let a Shadow Blop loose and it's draining light and color from the Lab! Platform your way through the lab to catch him while mixing and matching your color potions to match and alter your environment!
Made in two weeks as part of Pirate Software's Game Jam 15
Theme: "Shadows and Alchemy"
Game Design Document viewable here and linked in the downloads.

game.title: Shadow Realm
game.short_text: Top Down + Bullet Hell + Looter Shooter

details.title: Shadow Realm
details.description:
Bullet Hell / Looter Shooter / RPG with 2D + 3D pixel art visuals
Fight back monsters from the Shadow Realm!

Warning !! There is no saving data !!
Side note, I believe a last minute patch moments before submission caused the music to break. Might wanna play this one without any sound  O_o
Game Design Document  -- https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RJ8BlB0KJgzaEfaO2cvPQhj7O-C3diTEP9dVUIKnOBM/... 

Developer Note
There are no extra items for abilities, armors, and rings at the moment. Also, no other class than the knight is available. I ran out of time :(
It is also has not been balanced at all, so some things might be overpowered while others are weak.
There is no end, but there are 9 UT weapons, try to find them all. Most of those weapons are created by crafting them through the alchemy station, but some are drops from enemies.

Let me know if I should tweak some things!!

A game by: Binaya Shrestha & Alok Shrestha

game.title: ZILLOW
game.short_text: It’s dark outside, don’t stay too long despite being ready for that.

details.title: ZILLOW
details.description:
>Description<
“Zillow” is a first-person survival crafting game about a lost alchemist in the jungle. The darkness has surrounded the jungle, and you have to purify it by defeating the Corruption. You are afraid of shadows and the darkness, but you are able to fight against the shadow by your alchemistic knowledge. It’s dark outside, don’t stay too long despite being ready for that.

>Controls<
>Movements: W: move forward,  A: move left     S: move back     D: move right
>Run: Shift               >Jump:  Space              >Interact with objects: E 
>LMB: Throw Arrow/Potion/ Use Potions
>RMB: Switch between Arrow mode and Potion mode
>Tab: Open the inventory
>1,2,3: Switch between available potions or Arrows in its mode
>P: Pause the game
>How To play "ZILLOW"<
Zillow is a windows/Web game that can be both played in this page, or you can download the .rar version to play locally.

game.title: The Weight of Gold
game.short_text: Gilly was here

details.title: The Weight of Gold
details.description:
HINT: press TAB once you get to the main level, if you're ever lost.
Game Design Doc - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1cEUq0v_Ru22i87QfFiYtXfOiVeG02sdIS7bwAgGXLOA/...
Step into the boots of a brave man lost in the vast desert. With your new shady business partner, you can transform enemies into precious gold at his shop. Use your loot to power up your throwable concoction and uncover the ancient secrets buried beneath the sands. Your adventure awaits—are you ready to master the desert?
DEVELOPERS' NOTE
Due to the last minute issues that we ran into with FMOD compatibility with WebGL, our latest builds were coming out with no sound. Unfortunately, we were forced to upload an earlier build that had audio tho some things were not finished back then - so the balancing and features are not as up to date as they should have been. Biggest problems with this build that have already been fixed once:
Bug that sometimes bricks conversations and soft-locks the game. If you're stuck in the intro scene and can't progress through dialogue, press ESC and click "Skip intro?". That will put you into the main game. Same thing if you happen to get stuck in the dialogue in the main scene. Just press ESC and hit "Restart?".Final boss is missing hitbox colliders - he cannot actually hit you with most of his attacks. Have fun with this free boss!Gilly having very unclear dialogue. One example is a massive hint in one of his speeches in the intro scene: pressing TAB will bring up a help menu if you're feeling lost. Bug that causes the ending cutscene when our player will reach the full "corruption" will not trigger. If you see Gilly standing in the boss arena and silently judging you, just know you were about to get hit by the worst ending possible.
Due to this:
We have provided a windows build with these fixes WHICH WILL NOT BE RANKED OR CONSIDERED FOR THE RATINGS, it's just for people who want to see the endings:https://drive.google.com/file/d/1d32iD-tlcNcpwZc5khWEJ0zUSuCsF4-0/view 
Again, we encourage you to judge the game entirely based on the WebGL build. Leave your rating first, then feel free to try out the windows build with the functional endings. That way, it's only fair to the rest of the competition. 
THE DAY 15 PATCH IS COMING, AND IT WILL BE GLORIOUS!

moreInfo.Authors: VKint, ChanJohann, Joel Hanson, Carl Bisenius

resultData.title: Dane the Alchemist VS. The Forces of Evil

game.title: Dane the Alchemist VS. The Forces of Evil
game.short_text: Brew potions and recruit adventurers to fight against the monsters of the night!

details.title: Dane the Alchemist VS. The Forces of Evil
details.description:
Play in fullscreen for the best experience.
Created for Pirate Software Game Jam 15
View the Game Design Document
Dane is your average every-day peasant, running errands and living a normal day-to-day life... that is, until he discovers a mysterious book containing the knowledge of alchemy. Now, his new goal is to become a great adventurer! Brew potions and recruit party members to fight against monsters in auto-battler style combat.
How to play:
To brew potions, navigate the instruction book to the page of the potion you want to make. Add the appropriate ingredients, adjust the heat level to the specified amount, then complete the specified amount of full mixes.
Recruit at least 1 party member to fight monsters with, then enter the battle. Use your potions to your advantage to defeat enemies and support your teammates.
Controls:- Potion Brewing -Navigate and interact with the mouseSpace or Left Click to time indicator in the brewing minigame- Combat - 
1-9 - Select potionsLeft click an entity to apply potion directly, press "Splash!" for a slightly weaker effect, but applied to all entities on the respective side
Credits:
Programming and art by ItsDawg43
Music by Wither Gates
Font by Daniel Linssen

game.title: Don't Touch the Pavement
game.short_text: A Puzzle game where where you manipulate shadows to avoid burning your feet on the pavement

details.title: Don't Touch the Pavement
details.description:
Uh oh! Looks like you forgot to bring your shoes on your commute to work! How ever are you going to reach your office without burning your poor, bare feet on the pavement?
Never fear, for while you may have forgotten your shoes, you at least remembered your handy sun-repositioning device, as well as several elixir vials to power it!
Navigate your way through 10 levels, avoiding burning your feet by manipulating the sun to transform shadows to quell the searing heat of the pavement and allow safe passage, while making sure to conserve elixir .
Theme
We took the interpretation of shadows quite literally, objects cast shadows based off of the position of the sun.
For alchemy, we chose the definition of transformation, by combining the position of the sun, with the objects on the street, you are transforming the shadows in order to create a safe path across the street
Controls
WASD - Move the character
Arrow keys / Click and drag the slider at the bottom to move the sun.R to restart level
F to interact
ESC to pause
If you need to skip a level, you can press escape to open the pause menu and go to the level select.
Credits:
BubbleShade: Programming, Art, Game design, Audio
Sketched Doughnut: Moral support, Mortal Enemy. Programming
Game Design Document:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1eACxo87dVvR_nQalr1WrlH06l9jjPEzAi71NvhB4mIo/...

This our submission for the 2024 Pirate Software Game Jam, with the theme of Shadows and Alchemy.

game.title: A Doctor's Rent
game.short_text: Mix cures, administer to patients, turn them into monsters...... and beat rent.

details.title: A Doctor's Rent
details.description:
A Doctor's Rent is a simulation game where you create cures using multiple ingredients, then apply to the patients.
Business is slow, but rent is tight. To have more patients, you may need to do something sinister...You'll lose if you are 50 coins in debt. Or you're rich if you have 300 coins.
Controls - Escape or Enter for Pause Menu. Mouse for everything else.
Mac users: The game may not run well on Mac.

game.title: Rock Digger
game.short_text: Play as Frankenstone the living rock, and become a rock-digging rock star!

details.title: Rock Digger
details.description:
NOTE: Web version is broken for now, please try the downloadable demo on Steam in the meantime : https://store.steampowered.com/app/3096260/Rock_Digger/Rock Digger, the mining adventure where you play as a rock!
Explore an alien planet!
Dig for minerals and use them to upgrade your body with Alchemy.
Unearth Lost Alien Technologies and powers.
Throw A Billion Pickaxes?
Eventually reach deep enough underground to mine the core of the planet! And then... get blasted to a new planet!

A relaxing digging game, inspired by Dome Keeper but with no enemies and no timers!

Controls :
WASD (or regional equivalent) : Move
Space : Jump
F : Interact
Mouse Movement : AimLeft click : Throw a pickaxeRight click : Vacuum ores

game.title: Shadowtail
game.short_text: Short puzzle game about crafting potions as a mouse

details.title: Shadowtail
details.description:
About Shadowtail:
  
Shadowtail is a puzzle and maze game where the goal is to mix  ingredients into potions that have special effects on the player. The  goal of the game is to rescue a fellow mouse that is trapped in a cage  through exploration and potion crafting. Shadowtail was developed as part of the 2024 PirateSoftware Game Jam under the theme Shadows and Alchemy.
Controls:
    
WASD - Move
Space - Jump or Climb
E - Pick Up or Drop Item
F - Use or Read Item
P - Pause MenuR - Show known recipesF11/Escape - Toggle Fullscreen Mode
Game Design Document:
The game design document can be found here as well as in the downloads below. The Google Drive document contains additional information about the planning and development of Shadowtail.

game.title: Sunscreen Vampire
game.short_text: "Sunscreen Vampire" PirateJam15(Shadows & Alchemy)

details.title: Sunscreen Vampire
details.description:
Sunscreen Vampire
It is 1876, you are Barnabos Callins, alchemist vampire living in a European city.You wake up to find you have used up your last bottle of sunscreen! The only thing that keeps a vampire alive in direct sunlight. You have got to stick to the shadows or else....Now go and find the ingredients to make a new bottle and avoid both the sun and the townspeople.Use your alchemy skills to transmute found components into useful concoctions to create new shadows or "remove" the townspeople.This game was made for the Piratesoftware Gamejam 15.
Controls:
WASD to move
E to interact with item and objects
Q open use menu
R open inventory menu
C sneak toggle
F & G rotate camera
ESC & P pause gameMouse menus/ui input and action selection,confirmation,cancel input

game.title: Umbra's Cauldron
game.short_text: Progress through The 7 Stages of Alchemical Transformation

details.title: Umbra's Cauldron
details.description:
UMBRA'S CAULDRON is a card-based 2D game, where absolutely everything is a card! Dive into a magical shadow world and help unfold the secrets of the living cauldron looking to find a new physical husk.
Combine cards, sell cards, create new ones, buy card packs and go through the seven stages of alchemical transformation!
The demo ends after bringing your first shadow into life and unlocking a chest.
CONTROLSClick Cards with your left mouse button to Drag & Drop them around your alchemy worktable!
GDDhttps://docs.google.com/document/d/1fuglvVaSmKmNAgi_Gzge6cMDB3bKxuvfZGQRAD5fb2g/...

CREDITSProduction Design, Programming: Jonas GruetzmacherProgramming, Level Design: Jan HildebrandtArt, Animation: Selina Stückler

game.title: Witching Rush Hour
game.short_text: Survive the darkest night with only your broom, and a cauldron.

details.title: Witching Rush Hour
details.description:
It's almost the witching hour. Soon the land will become enveloped in shadow and be dangerous to traverse. All witches have ascended into the sky with their brooms. All witches except you, who still hasn't been able to fly. The other witches decided to aid you, by dropping wood for your cauldron from the sky. All that's left for you is use what ingredients you come by and try to survive the Witching Hour.Can you find all 29 potions?
Created for the 15th Pirate Software GameJam
Default Controls:
[W,A,S,D] - Move
[E] - Pick up/ Throw (Towards mouse cursor)
[SPACE] - Attack
[SHIFT] - Dash
[ESCAPE] - Pause

"AlcheMage: Crossy Shadows" is a top-down arcade game providing a fun, and addictive experience, where players control an AlcheMage, progressing in a world covered in darkness, using the alchemical staff  to bring light and to turn metallic rocks into gold to collect them.

game.title: Night Spirits Survivor
game.short_text: Alchemy And Shadows

details.title: Night Spirits Survivor
details.description:
GDD : Game Design Document (Google Docs)This is just a prototype, not a fully polished game.Each night spirits want to come to your house.
Hopefully, you can see it arriving as its shadow goes over you. Pay attention to the shape of the shadow to determine the type of spirit that is attacking you !
Match the shadow with its monster and cook the corresponding potion to protect you, and maybe survive until the next day....

game.short_text: A short, retro 3D, horror game about banishing an entity in the darkness.

details.title: In The Forest - Game Jam Version
details.description:
🚨 CONTROLS LISTED BELOW 🚨
A prototype game made for Pirate Software's 15th game jam.
There are massive stutters when initially loading the world, which I think is because of all of the audio being preloaded at once and all of the foliage.

BACKGROUND
One late summer, sometime in the 1980s, campers began to go missing at a campground. Jake, a conspiracist and self-proclaimed alchemist, arrives at the campground to investigate and see if his suspicions are true.

game.title: Reigncloud
game.short_text: Play as a cloud in an open-world simulation! Combine moisture, electricity, temperature and wind to transform the world!

details.title: Reigncloud
details.description:
Reigncloud is a playful open world environment simulation where you play as a cloud! By combining moisture, electricity, temperature, and wind - you can transform the world!
A first-person open-world game where you control a cloud and use its shadow to interact with the world! Combine elements like wind, lightning, rain, and snow to transform the world to your liking!
We recommend playing this game on Chrome browser. We observed performance issues when testing on Firefox. The world is 8sq km with a draw distance of 3km, so performance is being stretched.
Controls:
Move: WASD
Look: Move Mouse
Rain/Snow: Hold Left Click
Lightning strike: Right Click
Leave Clouds: Spacebar
Change Camera: C

Josh Poland

game.title: The Journey of Gumdrop
game.short_text: Defeat the shadow monsters in this fun twin-stick shooter

details.title: The Journey of Gumdrop
details.description:
Due to issues with Godot 4.x web exports the game runs poorly in non-chromium browsers (Firefox, Safari, etc). Play in Chrome for the best experience.
                                     

The Shadow realm's monsters are rampaging across the land - only Gumdrop, the kingdoms alchemist has the power to defeat the Shadow realm and save the land.
See developer HIGH SCORE in the screenshots if you want to attempt to beat it



A controller / gamepad is recommended
Move: wasd / left stick
Shoot: arrow keys / right stick
Accept / Use : Space / Right bumper / A button
Back / Switch Realms : L Shift / Left bumper / B button



Developed for the 2024  Pirate Software Game Jam 15
The Journey of Gumdrop is a spiritual successor to one of my previous game jam games Journey to Black Keep
Developed entirely by me!
Credit to Abstraction for the music


GDD:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1QZHxl30WNeqkZwsTNPb6fnr9WjGV957m_KtvumJT1Bs/...
